subcodes.first_line: The Word which today precedeth all words is the blessed utterance: "O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy most glorious Glory!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و کلمه‌ئی که الیوم مقدم است بر کل کلمهٴ مبارکهٴ اللهم انی اسئلک من بهائک بأبهاه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @law of Huququ'llah, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
